ddls:
CREATE TABLE "counties" (
  "county_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each county */,
  "county_name" TEXT /* Name of the county */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province the county belongs to */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Area of the county in square kilometers */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Main city or town in the county */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the county */,
  "elevation_m" REAL /* Average elevation of the county in meters */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("county_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_counties_province FOREIGN KEY ("province") REFERENCES provinces ("province_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the demographic data belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the county */,
  "spending" INTEGER /* Spending in the county */,
  "age_distribution" TEXT /* Age distribution of the county */,
  "gender_distribution" TEXT /* Gender distribution of the county */,
  "median_income" INTEGER /* Median income of the county */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate of the county */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level distribution of the county */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year to which the demographic data corresponds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_demographics_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sports" (
  "sport_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sports entry */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county the sports data belongs to */,
  "football_wins" INTEGER /* Number of All-Ireland Football wins */,
  "hurling_wins" INTEGER /* Number of All-Ireland Hurling wins */,
  "football_losses" INTEGER /* Number of All-Ireland Football losses */,
  "hurling_losses" INTEGER /* Number of All-Ireland Hurling losses */,
  "football_draws" INTEGER /* Number of All-Ireland Football draws */,
  "hurling_draws" INTEGER /* Number of All-Ireland Hurling draws */,
  "most_recent_football_win" INTEGER /* Year of the most recent All-Ireland Football win */,
  "most_recent_hurling_win" INTEGER /* Year of the most recent All-Ireland Hurling win */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sport_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sports_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "provinces" (
  "province_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each province */,
  "province_name" TEXT /* Name of the province */,
  "area_sq_km" REAL /* Total area of the province in square kilometers */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the province */,
  "capital" TEXT /* Main city or town in the province */,
  "number_of_counties" INTEGER /* Number of counties in the province */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("province_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sports analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Job title or position within the team */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration_seconds" INTEGER /* Duration of the session in seconds */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "football_championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was held */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the championship */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Second-place team in the championship */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Score of the final match */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the championship */,
  "top_goal_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top goal scorer */,
  "top_goal_scorer_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the top goal scorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hurling_championships" (
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each championship */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the championship was held */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the championship */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Second-place team in the championship */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Score of the final match */,
  "number_of_matches" INTEGER /* Total number of matches played in the championship */,
  "top_goal_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top goal scorer */,
  "top_goal_scorer_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the top goal scorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("championship_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "county_football_wins" (
  "win_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each win */,
  "county_id" INTEGER /* ID of the county that won the championship */,
  "championship_id" INTEGER /* ID of the championship won */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the win */,
  "final_score" TEXT /* Score of the final match */,
  "runner_up" TEXT /* Second-place team in the championship */,
  "top_goal_scorer" TEXT /* Name of the top goal scorer */,
  "top_goal_scorer_goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the top goal scorer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("win_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_football_wins_championship_id FOREIGN KEY ("championship_id") REFERENCES football_championships ("championship_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_county_football_wins_county_id FOREIGN KEY ("county_id") REFERENCES counties ("county_id")
)
